title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.070 - Center may accept gifts
text:
205.070.  Center may accept gifts. — Any person, firm, organization, society or corporation desiring to make donations of money, personal property or real estate for the benefit of such health center, shall have the right to vest title of such property so donated, in the county or counties, to be controlled when so accepted by the board of health center trustees according to the terms of deed, gift, devise or bequest of such property.
(L. 1945 p. 969 § 10, A.L. 1951 p. 779)
